📝 Walkthrough ## Walkthrough アンサンブル戦略（BestScore, Weighted）を追加し、aggregateResults の入力型を配列から Map に変更。StaticRegistry にスキーマ検証と RemoteRegistry を導入。多数のアダプタ／パーサで i18n（I18nKey / translate）対応と EngineError の i18nKey 拡張を実施。ビルド設定・テストも広範に更新。 ## Changes |Cohort / File(s)|Summary| |---|---| |**アンサンブル戦略**
`packages/adapter-ensemble/src/strategies/BestScoreStrategy.ts`, `packages/adapter-ensemble/src/strategies/WeightedStrategy.ts`, `packages/adapter-ensemble/src/strategies/MajorityVoteStrategy.ts`, `packages/adapter-ensemble/src/strategies/index.ts`|BestScore/Weighted を追加。aggregateResults の受け取りを配列→`Map`へ変更。MajorityVoteStrategy を Map 対応に更新。i18n 対応のエラー処理を導入。| |**アンサンブル戦略テスト**
`packages/adapter-ensemble/src/strategies/__tests__/*`|BestScore/Weighted のユニットテスト追加、MajorityVoteStrategy テストを Map 前提に更新。| |**EnsembleAdapter 変更**
`packages/adapter-ensemble/src/EnsembleAdapter.ts`, `packages/adapter-ensemble/src/__tests__/EnsembleAdapter.test.ts`|search フローで結果収集を配列→Map に変更し strategy.aggregateResults を Map で呼び出す。not-ready エラーに i18nKey と翻訳メッセージを付与。| |**Registry: スキーマ検証 & RemoteRegistry**
`packages/registry/src/index.ts`, `packages/registry/src/__tests__/RemoteRegistry.test.ts`, `packages/registry/data/engines.json`, `packages/registry/package.json`, `.github/workflows/refresh-sri.yml`, `scripts/refresh-engine-sris.mjs`|StaticRegistry に Zod スキーマ検証導入。RemoteRegistry 実装（fetch/timeout/SRI 検証/バリデーション/エラーの i18n 化）。engines.json 更新と SRI 更新ワークフロー／スクリプト追加。| |**Core: i18n 型導入と EngineError 拡張**
`packages/core/src/errors/EngineError.ts`, `packages/core/src/types.ts`, `packages/core/src/bridge/*`, `packages/core/src/workers/*`, `packages/core/src/loaders/*`|I18nKey 型を追加し EngineError に i18nKey を追加。EngineLoader 等で i18nKey/i18nParams を付与、fetch タイムアウトや SRI 検証の強化。| |**アダプタ／パーサ群の i18n 化／registry マージ**
`packages/adapter-*/src/*` (例: stockfish, uci, usi, gtp, gnubg, katago, edax, mortal, yaneuraou)|多数のアダプタ／パーサでエラーメッセージを translate(i18nKey) に置換、EngineError に i18nKey を含める。多くのファクトリで OfficialRegistry.resolve による sources マージを追加（ただし一部は registry 参照削除）。| |**ドメイン型整理と i18n**
`packages/domain-*/src/index.ts`（go/shogi/chess/mahjong/reversi/backgammon 等）|検索関連型（I*SearchOptions/Info/Result）の追加・移動と検証エラーの i18n 化。optional 型を明示的に `| undefined` に変更した箇所あり。| |**テスト追加 / 更新**
`packages/registry/src/__tests__/RemoteRegistry.test.ts`, `packages/core/src/bridge/__tests__/EngineBridge.test.ts`, `packages/adapter-stockfish/src/__tests__/StockfishAdapter.test.ts`, ...|RemoteRegistry のロード/SRI 検証、レジストリ解決順、Stockfish のカスタム registry 設定などを検証するテストを追加・更新。| |**ビルド／パッケージ設定変更**
ルートおよび多数パッケージの `package.json` / `tsconfig.json`（adapter-*, domain-*, i18n, ui-* 等）|多くのパッケージで `@multi-game-engines/*` を tsup の external 対象に追加、i18n を依存に追加、tsconfig を base/refs ベースへ統一、@types/node 版調整などを実施。| |**i18n モジュール更新**
`packages/i18n/src/*`, `packages/i18n/src/locales/*.json`, `packages/i18n/src/types.ts`|翻訳ヘルパー t を追加、英日ロケールに多数キー追加、ValidI18nKey 型を拡張してキー集合を定義。| ## Sequence Diagram(s) ```mermaid sequenceDiagram participant Client participant RemoteRegistry participant Fetch as "fetch (network)" participant Validator participant StaticRegistry Client->>RemoteRegistry: new RemoteRegistry(url, expectedSri?) Client->>RemoteRegistry: load() RemoteRegistry->>Fetch: GET url (with AbortSignal.timeout) Fetch-->>RemoteRegistry: response (arraybuffer) or error alt fetch success RemoteRegistry->>Validator: verifySri(buffer, expectedSri?) alt sri ok or not provided RemoteRegistry->>Validator: parse JSON, validate manifest schema alt valid manifest RemoteRegistry->>StaticRegistry: this.data = manifest RemoteRegistry-->>Client: load resolved (isLoaded=true) else invalid manifest RemoteRegistry-->>Client: throw EngineError (i18nKey: registry.invalidFormat) end else sri mismatch RemoteRegistry-->>Client: throw EngineError (i18nKey: registry.sriMismatch) end else fetch failed or timeout RemoteRegistry-->>Client: throw EngineError (i18nKey: registry.fetchFailed / registry.timeout) end Client->>RemoteRegistry: resolve(id, version) RemoteRegistry->>StaticRegistry: return this.data.engines[id]?.[version] || null ``` ## Estimated code review effort 🎯 5 (Critical) | ⏱️ ~120 minutes ## Possibly related PRs - hdkz-dev/multi-game-engines#33 — Zenith-tierの総合改修と重複（EngineError.i18nKey/i18n 掛け合わせ、レジストリ改修、アダプタ／ドメインの変更）。 - hdkz-dev/multi-game-engines#25 — アンサンブル関連（aggregateResults の型変更、戦略追加/改修）が重なっておりインターフェース互換に関連。 - hdkz-dev/multi-game-engines#13 — コアのブリッジ／ローダー周り（EngineLoader/WorkerCommunicator 等）で同様のエラー/i18n/SRI 改修を含む可能性が高い。 ## Poem > 🐰 ぴょんと跳ねて最良を探し、 > 重みを集めて票を数え、 > 遠いレジストリの声を fetch で確かめ、 > エラーには翻訳の鍵を添えて、 > ぴょん — 新しい戦略でまた走るよ。
🚥 Pre-merge checks | ✅ 3
✅ Passed checks (3 passed) | Check name | Status | Explanation | | :----------------: | :------- | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Description Check | ✅ Passed | Check skipped - CodeRabbit’s high-level summary is enabled. | | Title check | ✅ Passed | プルリクエストのタイトル「feat(registry): implement pluggable decentralized engine registry and ensemble strategies」は、主要な変更内容（プラグイン可能な分散型エンジンレジストリとアンサンブル戦略の実装）を明確かつ簡潔に要約しており、変更セットの重要な目的を正確に反映しています。 | | Docstring Coverage | ✅ Passed | Docstring coverage is 83.33% which is sufficient. The required threshold is 80.00%. |
✏️ Tip: You can configure your own custom pre-merge checks in the settings.
✨ Finishing Touches
🧪 Generate unit tests (beta) - [ ] Create PR with unit tests - [ ] Post copyable unit tests in a comment - [ ] Commit unit tests in branch `task/registry-cleanup-safety`

performed_via_github_app.name: coderabbitai
performed_via_github_app.description:
# Transforming Code Reviews with AI

## Features

**Automated Reviews**: Continuous reviews of the pull requests including incremental commits. 

**Summarization**: Generates high-level summary and a technical walkthrough of the PR changes. 

**Line-by-line review**: Provides line-by-line suggestions committable with one click.

**Codebase verification**:  Verifies the impact on the overall codebase and identifies missing changes.

**Insights into your code**:  Ask any questions on your codebase within the pull request 

**Chat about your code** : Chat with the bot around your code. The more you chat, the smarter it gets.

**Issue Validation**:  Validates the PR against the linked issues and identifies other related issues

body:
## Summary of Changes Hello @hdkz-dev, I'm Gemini Code Assist[^1]! I'm currently reviewing this pull request and will post my feedback shortly. In the meantime, here's a summary to help you and other reviewers quickly get up to speed! This pull request significantly enhances the engine management system by introducing a pluggable decentralized engine registry and advanced ensemble strategies. It allows for dynamic fetching of engine manifests from remote sources and provides flexible ways to combine results from multiple engines. The changes also improve code quality and security through stricter type checking and robust Subresource Integrity validation. ### Highlights * **Engine Registry Infrastructure**: Implemented `RemoteRegistry` for fetching engine manifests from external URLs and established a LIFO-based resolution chain in `EngineBridge` for registry prioritization. * **Advanced Ensemble Strategies**: Introduced `BestScoreStrategy` to select moves based on the highest evaluation and `WeightedStrategy` as a foundation for weighted voting among engines. * **Quality & Security Enhancements**: Eliminated `any` types with `unknown` double-casting and enforced strict SRI validation for resource hashes. * **Stockfish Integration**: Integrated real Stockfish 16.0.0 binaries with jsDelivr URLs and SRI hashes into `engines.json`.
Changelog * **packages/adapter-ensemble/src/strategies/BestScoreStrategy.ts** * Added `BestScoreStrategy` to aggregate results by selecting the move with the highest score (cp or winrate). * **packages/adapter-ensemble/src/strategies/WeightedStrategy.ts** * Added `WeightedStrategy` as a placeholder for weighted majority voting among engine results. * **packages/adapter-ensemble/src/strategies/__tests__/BestScoreStrategy.test.ts** * Added unit tests for `BestScoreStrategy` to verify correct selection based on cp and winrate. * **packages/adapter-ensemble/src/strategies/__tests__/WeightedStrategy.test.ts** * Added a unit test for `WeightedStrategy` to confirm it selects the most voted move (with uniform weights). * **packages/adapter-ensemble/src/strategies/index.ts** * Exported the newly added `BestScoreStrategy` and `WeightedStrategy`. * **packages/adapter-stockfish/src/__tests__/StockfishAdapter.test.ts** * Added a test case to ensure the `StockfishAdapter` can use a provided registry configuration. * **packages/core/src/bridge/__tests__/EngineBridge.test.ts** * Updated imports to include `IEngineConfig`. * Added comprehensive tests for the LIFO-based registry chain resolution logic in `EngineBridge`. * **packages/registry/data/engines.json** * Updated the Stockfish entry to version 16.0.0 with correct jsDelivr URLs and SRI hashes. * Modified URLs for Yaneuraou, Katago, Edax, and Mortal to point to GitHub Pages assets. * **packages/registry/package.json** * Added `stockfish` version 16.0.0 as a dev dependency. * **packages/registry/src/__tests__/RemoteRegistry.test.ts** * Added unit tests for `RemoteRegistry` to verify its ability to fetch and resolve remote engine manifests and handle fetch failures. * **packages/registry/src/index.ts** * Refactored `StaticRegistry` to accept initial data. * Introduced `RemoteRegistry` for dynamic fetching of engine manifests from external URLs. * **pnpm-lock.yaml** * Updated the pnpm lockfile to reflect the new `stockfish` dependency and other changes.

Using Gemini Code Assist
The full guide for Gemini Code Assist can be found on our [documentation page](https://developers.google.com/gemini-code-assist/docs/review-github-code), here are some quick tips. Invoking Gemini You can request assistance from Gemini at any point by creating a comment using either `/gemini ` or `@gemini-code-assist `. Below is a summary of the supported commands on the current page. Feature | Command | Description --- | --- | --- Code Review | `/gemini review` | Performs a code review for the current pull request in its current state. Pull Request Summary | `/gemini summary` | Provides a summary of the current pull request in its current state. Comment | @gemini-code-assist | Responds in comments when explicitly tagged, both in pull request comments and review comments. Help | `/gemini help` | Displays a list of available commands. Customization To customize Gemini Code Assist for GitHub experience, repository maintainers can create a configuration file and/or provide a custom code review style guide (such as PEP-8 for Python) by creating and adding files to a `.gemini/` folder in the base of the repository. Detailed instructions can be found [here](https://developers.google.com/gemini-code-assist/docs/customize-gemini-behavior-github). Limitations & Feedback Gemini Code Assist may make mistakes. Please leave feedback on any instances where its feedback is incorrect or counter productive. You can react with :thumbsup: and :thumbsdown: on @gemini-code-assist comments. If you're interested in giving your feedback about your experience with Gemini Code Assist for Github and other Google products, sign up [here](https://google.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_2cyuGuTWsEw84yG). You can also get AI-powered code generation, chat, as well as code reviews directly in the IDE at no cost with the [Gemini Code Assist IDE Extension](https://cloud.google.com/products/gemini/code-assist).

Gemini can make mistakes, so double check it and [use code with caution](https://support.google.com/legal/answer/13505487).

performed_via_github_app.name: Gemini Code Assist
performed_via_github_app.description:
**Accelerate code reviews and improve code quality**

Bring the power of [Gemini](https://gemini.google.com/) directly to GitHub, providing AI-powered code reviews on your pull requests, with automatic pull request summaries, ready-to-commit code suggestions and the ability to invoke Gemini for assistance at any point on the PR.
